title: Custom PU Leather Sunglasses Case Portable Travel Packaging
highlights: Portable protective case for sunglasses and eyeglasses
Custom logo and surface finish supported
description_html:
Custom PU Leather Sunglasses Case Portable Travel Packaging

  • Portable protective case for sunglasses and eyeglasses
  • Custom logo and surface finish supported
  • MOQ reference: 500 pcs
  • Lead time reference: 15-20 days
  • Eyeglasses Cases & Bags category aligned

Application: eyewear packaging, retail gift set, custom brand promotion

Customization: embossing, hot foil, debossing, print logo

Packaging notes: paper box, pouch and cloth can be bundled together
